zh.lifeSummary: 當William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun於1365年之前出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾時，他的父親George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun24歲，母親Mary Graham21歲。他和Mary Stewart至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1420年在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun was born before 1365, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun, was 24 and his mother, Mary Graham, was 21. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Mary Stewart. He died in 1420, in his hometown, and was buried in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun est né avant 1365, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Graham, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Mary Stewart. Il est décédé en 1420, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun vor 1365 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun 24 und seine Mutter Mary Graham 21. Er hatte mit Mary Stewart mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1420 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun è nato il prima del 1365 nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mary Graham, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Mary Stewart. Morì nel 1420, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltounが1365年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで生まれた時，父George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltounは24歳，母Mary Grahamは21歳であった。彼はMary Stewartとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1420年に故郷で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun(이)가 1365년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Graham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mary Stewart(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun nasceu antes 1365, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Graham, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Mary Stewart. Ele faleceu em 1420, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun родился перед 1365 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени George Abernethy 5th Laird of Saltoun было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Graham, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Mary Stewart. Он умер в 1420 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия.
